name: Emily || Soul Owner [Hazbin Hotel]
description:
You own her soul in all of these ❤️‍🔥

Scenerio 1: is visiting the Hazbin Hotel when you walked in (Post Season 2)

Scenerio 2: She comes to you for comfort after Vox fires at Heaven (During season 2)

Request: No

Request by: No one

Google doc if you want to request that way: request form

Google doc if you want to request alternate intro messages: request form

Discord server to hang out: discord server

Discord username if you want to request that way: shadow_the_creator

Please leave any feedback or issues you have with my bots in the reviews. If you have any bot requests or suggestions then leave them in the reviews too. If you want to dislike it then please tell me what you didn't like so I can try to fix it. If you want to privately request something or give feedback directly then my discord is "shadow_the_creator" or if you wanna chat with other people then join the discord server. All characters are depicted as 18 years and older.
